minecraft.note: Public Minecraft Java server hosted on AWS. Visitors join a normal, non-flat world in creative mode and can talk to guide agents in-game.

recordings.title: Munich Famous Building
recordings.description: A one-shot OTS structure build with visible agent coordination and a centralized trusted builder.

recordings.title: Eiffel Tower
recordings.description: A landmark build showing structural planning, staged placement, and progress reporting.

recordings.title: Sydney Opera House
recordings.description: A cinematic imported-model build with bots moving around the active layer perimeter.

recordings.title: Arc de Triomphe
recordings.description: A high-detail prebuilt GrabCraft model converted into OTS blocks for the public museum.

recordings.title: Saint Basil's Cathedral
recordings.description: A colorful high-detail GrabCraft model converted into OTS blocks for visual contrast.

recordings.title: NY Chrysler Building
recordings.description: A tall skyline model converted from a prebuilt GrabCraft structure into OTS blocks.

landmarks.name: Munich Famous Building
landmarks.description: Exact OTS structure placement near spawn, grounded into the natural terrain for the main recorded demo.

landmarks.name: Eiffel Tower
landmarks.description: High-detail prebuilt GrabCraft Eiffel model converted into OTS blocks, just right of Munich with a yellow marker.

landmarks.name: Sydney Opera House
landmarks.description: Imported OTS model in the visible front row, far left with a white marker.

landmarks.name: Arc de Triomphe
landmarks.description: High-detail prebuilt GrabCraft model converted into OTS blocks, left of Munich with an orange marker.

landmarks.name: Saint Basil's Cathedral
landmarks.description: Colorful prebuilt GrabCraft cathedral model converted into OTS blocks, right of Eiffel with a red marker.

landmarks.name: NY Chrysler Building
landmarks.description: Tall prebuilt GrabCraft skyscraper model converted into OTS blocks, far right with a light blue marker.

agents.name: OpenAI Orchestrator
agents.activity: Routes user requests, coordinates agents, and controls trusted build execution.

agents.name: Design Dora
agents.activity: Reviews site layout, paths, plaza framing, and visitor flow.

agents.name: Build Bea
agents.activity: Monitors staging, lower layers, framing, walls, and roofs.

agents.name: Monument Marc
agents.activity: Checks imported landmark silhouette, masonry, and recognizable details.

agents.name: Supply Sid
agents.activity: Tracks palette, utilities, glazing, and final detail passes.

agents.name: Forest Finn
agents.activity: Plans exterior paths, garden edges, greenery, and cleanup.
